basic_details.job_title: Tripura PSC Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tripura Public Service Commission (Tripura PSC) has published the Junior Engineer Recruitment Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 8 Junior Engineer positions. Candidates within the age range of 18–40 years and holding a Degree in Electrical Engineering (for Grade-I) or Diploma in Electrical Engineering (for Grade-II) are eligible to apply online at the official website. The application process will be active from 19 May 2026 to 12 June 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for ST/SC/PH candidates and Government servants.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Electrical Engineering for Grade-I and Diploma in Electrical Engineering for Grade-II.
qualification.details: Junior Engineer, Grade-I (Degree), Electrical Group-B Gazetted: Degree in Electrical Engineering from a recognized University/Institution. Junior Engineer, Grade-II, Diploma, Electrical Group-C Non-Gazetted: Diploma in Electrical Branch of Engineering or its equivalent academic qualification from a recognized University/Institution.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Junior Engineer, Grade-I (Degree), Electrical Group-B Gazetted
Junior Engineer, Grade-II, Diploma, Electrical Group-C Non-Gazetted

salary_details.details: Junior Engineer, Grade-I: Pay of Rs. 47,600/- Tripura Pay matrix, 2018, Cell-1 of Level-13 Junior Engineer, Grade-II: Rs. 34,700/- as per Tripura Pay Matrix, 2018, Cell-1 of Level-10

selection_process: Preliminary Examination (MCQ Type) Main (written) Examination Interview-cum-Personality Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Tripura PSC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Tripura PSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Tripura PSC Junior Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Tripura PSC Junior Engineer recruitment is 12 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Junior Engineer posts?
faq.answer: For Grade-I, a Degree in Electrical Engineering is required. For Grade-II, a Diploma in Electrical Engineering or its equivalent is necessary. Specific details are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Tripura PSC Junior Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for applying to these posts is between 18 to 40 years. Age relaxation is provided for certain categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for Junior Engineer posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies for Junior Engineer posts, divided into Grade-I and Grade-II categories based on educational qualifications.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the Tripura PSC Junior Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The application fee varies based on the post category and candidate's community. General candidates for Group-B posts pay Rs. 350/-, while for Group-C posts, it is Rs. 200/-. Reduced fees apply for SC/ST/BPL/PH candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Tripura PSC Junior Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Preliminary Examination (MCQ Type), followed by a Main (written) Examination, and finally an Interview-cum-Personality Test.

faq.question: Q7. Is the Tripura PSC Junior Engineer job temporary or permanent?
faq.answer: The job type for these Junior Engineer posts is mentioned as Temporary in the official notification released by Tripura PSC.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary structure for the Junior Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Junior Engineer Grade-I is as per Level-13 of the Tripura Pay Matrix, 2018 (Rs. 47,600/-), and for Grade-II, it is as per Level-10 (Rs. 34,700/-).

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is highly recommended to download and read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q10. How do I apply for the Tripura PSC Junior Engineer posts?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official Tripura PSC website. The "How to Apply" section in this article provides step-by-step instructions.
